name: myopenpanels
description: Open MyOpenPanels in a native Codex widget, backed by the project-local OpenPanels studio.

interface.shortDescription: Open the project canvas as a native Codex widget.
interface.longDescription: MyOpenPanels opens the project-backed OpenPanels local studio inside a native Codex widget when supported, while retaining the localhost browser workflow for agents without native widget support.
defaultPrompt: Open the MyOpenPanels panel for this project.
Use MyOpenPanels to inspect the current canvas selection.
Place the generated image into MyOpenPanels.
